Take a stroll through Beijing's Olympic Forest Park and experience the vibrant hues of autumn, as ginkgo and maple trees transform the landscape into a sea of gold and red. Discover the park's top spots, where locals embrace seasonal activities and capture beautiful photos among the colorful foliage.
